diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createMiddleware, cCtx, factory, createHTMLFactory, createTemplateFactory
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with multiple helper exports for creating middleware factories
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper that exports middleware creation utilities and HTML/template factories for Hono
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: route, routeWithMethod, createMiddleware, on
+- Reads as: TypeScript module for routing helper with method registration
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Route helper for registering HTTP methods and creating route handlers in Hono
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, UpgradeWebSocket, WSEvents, WSReadyState
+- Reads as: WebSocket helper module with context and event handler support
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for defining and handling WebSocket connections in Hono apps
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, deleteCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteSignedCookie
+- Reads as: Cookie management helper using parse, parseSigned, serialize utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading, writing, and deleting signed/unsigned cookies
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: Testing helper using hc client with custom fetch for testing Hono apps
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing utility that creates test clients for Hono applications
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: Runtime detection helper for different environments (node, deno, bun, workerd, etc.)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.test.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper for detecting runtime environment and accessing env bindings
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: rawCssString, css, cx, keyframes, cssClasses, className, cssVariable
+- Reads as: CSS-in-JS helper exporting multiple styling utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS helper providing styling utilities with class name and keyframe support
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: Common utility definitions for CSS helper symbols and interfaces
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Core CSS helper utilities with shared symbols and common functions
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, forward, handleHeaders, handleStream
+- Reads as: Proxy/helper for forwarding requests to other services
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.test.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding HTTP requests and handling response streams
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Development helper for inspecting and displaying router routes
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.test.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Dev helper utilities for showing and inspecting application routes
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw, createHtmlCallback, createHtmlString
+- Reads as: HTML rendering helper with string building and callback support
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.test.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML helper for building escaped HTML strings with template literal support
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: generateStaticPages, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: SSG utility re-exporting ssg, middleware, and plugin exports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generator helper for pre-rendering pages and route generation
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: generateStaticPages, StaticGenerator, fetchRoutes
+- Reads as: Core static page generation logic with file output handling
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG core implementation for generating static pages from Hono routes
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: Path manipulation utilities with static route filtering
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG utilities for path operations and route filtering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_PARAMS
+- Reads as: Middleware handlers for SSG context and parameter handling
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware for managing generation context and route parameters
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: Streaming helper re-exporting stream, SSE, and text utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming utility hub exporting server-side streaming APIs
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: Base streaming API handling chunked response output
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Core streaming implementation for chunked respo
